name: Name
description: The display name for the object.

name: Disabled
description: When true, the object should be considered removed.

name: If Operation
description: Used by Conditional objects to determine the how to use the values of the 'condition' object for comparisons.

name: Adds
description: Used by Conditional objects to determine the values to add when aplied.

name: Subs
description: Used by Conditional objects to determine the values to sub when aplied.

name: Sets
description: Used by Conditional objects to determine the values to set when aplied.

name: Hidden
description: Lists properties to keep hidden.

name: Reveals
description: Used in combination with objects that have subjects to indicate what they reveal about those subjects.

name: Game Master
description: Flags objects as game masters. Primarily for use on Player objects.

name: Subjects
description: Used in combination with objects that have subjects to indicate what they reveal about those subjects.

name: Game Master
description: Indicates that a player is a game master.

name: Username
description: Name used to log into the system.

name: Password
description: The resulting hash of a password for identification purposes.

name: Description
description: The description of the object.

name: E-mail
description: E-mail address at which to reach the owner of the object.

name: Last
description: Timestamp of the last known activity for this object.

name: Expiry
description: Time over which the object is valid.

name: Expires To
description: Indicates the new parent for this object once expired.

name: Concealment
description: Maps the covering for fields when `is_concealed` is true. These manifest as full changes, so changes to stats such as `strength` will behave accordingly.

name: Covered
description: Maps fields for covering on UI displays meant to not change the behavior of the object.

name: Is Concealed
description: Flag to prevent display of this object ot players

name: Expires From
description: Indicates that object values should be pulled to this object on expiration, this value identifying the object to use. If a template is specified, values are generated and pushed into this object.

name: Template
description: When set, this object is considered a template and can create children as described in the template object to set values of generated children.

name: Player
description: Reference to a Player object.

name: JSON
description: Used for storing raw JSON data. Generally for historical use.

name: Value
description: Used for simple value representation.

name: Time
description: Tracks game time offset.

name: Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes for the object.

name: Permissions
description: Maps a concept to an access level for more complex permission controls.

name: Authorization Tokens
description: Maps authorization tokens to expiration times. This is more to reserve the data than store.

name: Date
description: Tracks the real time offset.

name: Meeting
description: The meeting at which this object is tied.

name: Owners
description: Lists the players that own and operate the object.

name: Dead
description: Flags that the object is considered deceased.

name: Icon
description: CSS class to display as short hand for this object.

name: Game Master Note
description: For game masters to save notes about this object and is meant to be trimmed before being sent to players.

name: Sessions
description: List of sessions for a player.

name: Object ID
description: Used to track that an object is directly related to another object.

name: Data
description: Used for large data storage (Such as images). Typically Base64 encoded.

name: Displayed As
description: Maps expected values of this field to strings to display for that value. This serves to prettify values without the need for an entirely different class.

name: Connections
description: Number of active connections.

name: Is Preview
description: Flag to mark this object as a preview of something and not an actual object

name: X Position
description: X location of the object.

name: Y Position
description: Y location of the object.

name: Conditionals
description: Lists of conditionals that may be applied to this object.

name: Order
description: The order in which this field displays or computes when applicable.

name: Preview Data
description: The properties to use when generating a preview.

name: Preview Class
description: The class of object being previewed. Drives constructor choice.

name: Strength
description: How strong you are

name: Dexterity
description: Your ability to control your movements

name: Parent
description: Parental object reference for base object properties. References any object.

name: Intelligence
description: The amount of raw knowledge you can keep on hand at once

name: Wisdom
description: Your ability to understand the workings of things

name: Charisma
description: The strength of your personality

name: Strength Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Strength}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Dexterity Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Dexterity}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Constitution Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Constitution}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Intelligence Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Intelligence}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Wisdom Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Wisdom}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Charisma Modifier
description: Amount added to ${Charisma}$ based ${Skill Checks}$

name: Mobility
description: How mobile you are, usually restricted by armor. This determines the max contribution of dexterity to your armor

name: Playing As
description: Indicates the primary character for a player

name: Played By
description: Indicates the primary player for an entity

name: Limited
description: Limit the number of chaining branches to take

name: End Time
description: When this finished

name: Loyal To
description: Indicates who this entity is loyal to, used for summons and minions and the like

name: Title
description: Used for things like page and document titles. This differs from the Title class which is more for things like 'King', 'Doctor', or 'Savior of Callenth'

name: Titles
description: Titles held by this object for designation purposes

name: Skill
description: The skill involved in using or operation this object, if any.

name: Alignment
description: The alignment of this entity.

name: Population
description: The total population of this object, usually entities to a location but use to track other count like things like potions in a container. This is specifically to count total contents where enumerating them as individual objects is not desired.

name: Pool Gain
description: Adds to the character pool for selecting changes

name: Spacing
description: Used to indicate what kind of spacing should be used between objects, for instance in datasets, the starting dataset may specify how to separate generated names and subsequent dataset spacings are ignored

name: Skill Checks
description: Maps a Skill ID to this objects numerical ability to perform that skill.

name: Incidents
description: IDs of the Incidents to which this object is associated

name: Selection
description: An array of objects that define choices for a player to make. This is largely for interpretation by the UI, should attempt to leverage/align the 'point_pool' object, and is merely maintained by the server. Usage is meant for things like choosing class specialization feats such as Rangers choosing between Archery, Dueling, etc.

name: History
description: A quick reference array of recent actions taken. This is meant to aid players with reviewing recent activity and not meant to serve as the entirety of their history as that is handled by the universe chronicle

name: Entities
description: List of entities tied to this object

name: Points of Interest
description: List of locations that may be of interest. This field's data is usually inferred during render rather than being explicitly defined and is thus not currently attached to any class.

name: Map Distance
description: Constant for distance measuring across a location.

name: i
description: Currently used as a dynamic table field and not actually for object usage

name: Killed
description: List of creatures killed in a skirmish

name: Retreated
description: List of creatures that escaped during combat

name: Events
description: List of events, primarily rolls, for this fight. When active, chat events are also saved here.

name: Contains
description: List of entities and items inside this object

name: Gender
description: The gender of this object

name: URL
description: Indicates the web location for associated information on this object

name: NPC Task
description: The general task or job for this NPC

name: NPC Voice
description: The general tone of voice for this NPC

name: NPC Personality
description: The general personality of this NPC

name: Is Chest
description: Flag to indicate an entity is treasure chest of some kind that allows easy player viewing/looting

name: Is Locked
description: Indicates if this object is manipulatable by a player or not. When true, only a game master or the system can make changes around it, such as removing an effect or unattuning/unequiping an item.

name: Is NPC
description: Flag to indicate an entity is an NPC

name: Is Shop
description: Flag to indicate an entity has shop functionality

name: Is Primary
description: Marks an object as primary for display considerations

name: Is Hostile
description: Flag to indicate an entity is explicitly hostile, generally for monster-esq creatures

name: Profile
description: Profile data to use for this object

name: Portrait
description: Portrait (Short Hand or Bust) image for this object

name: Picture
description: Picutre (Full Length or Encompassing) image for this object

name: Background Image
description: Background image for this object. This is for objects like locations to display as backgrounds when entities are at the location.

name: Main Weapon
description: Indicates which of the weapons held by this creature is its primary weapon.

name: Coordinates
description: Array of coordinates to render on an image for thigns such as a map.

name: Has Rendering Path
description: Flag to indicate this object has a rendering path.

name: Has Rendering Filled
description: Flag to indicate this object's rendered path should be filled in.

name: Rendering Path
description: Point path for the polygon. This array contains 2 element arrays for the x & y coordinates. May also contain a reference to an Entity or Location and subsequently leverages the x,y coordinates of that object. The Entity/Location note is not restrictive, resolved object just requires an x and y numeric property. Unresolvable values are skipped with a console warning.

name: Rendering Closed Path
description: When true, this path is treated as a polygon with fill

name: Rendering Fill Color
description: Coloring. Use Hex RGBA specification; ie. #FFFFFF60

name: Rendering Path Color
description: Coloring. Use Hex RGBA specification; ie. #FFFFFF60

name: Point Pool
description: Various points for improving your character in various ways

name: Acquired In
description: Session when this was acquired

name: Acquired At
description: Maps IDs to the game time at which they were found

name: From
description: This was learned from this creature

name: Rendering Path Thickness
description: Coloring

name: Map Image
description: Map image for this object

name: Map Background Image
description: Background image for the associated map. Something like a star field. fixed and covers the rest of the canvas.

name: URLs
description: Array of URLs

name: Cost
description: The general cost of this object

name: Barbarian
description: Current Barbarian level

name: Bard
description: Current Bard level

name: Cleric
description: Current Cleric level

name: Druid
description: Current Druid level

name: Fighter
description: Current Fighter level

name: Monk
description: Current Monk level

name: Paladin
description: Current Paladin level

name: Ranger
description: Current Ranger level

name: Rogue
description: Current Rogue level

name: Sorcerer
description: Current Sorcerer level

name: Warlock
description: Current Warlock level

name: Wizard
description: Current Wizard level

name: Initiative
description: Combat order for this creature

name: Passive Perception
description: This creature's ability to notice things without specifically looking for them

name: Current Stealth
description: Current stealth for this creature

name: Current Perception
description: Current perception for this creature

name: Investigation
description: Current investigative ability for this creature

name: Skirmishes
description: List of fights that occurred in during this meeting

name: Known By
description: List of entities that know this

name: Held By
description: The entity holding this object

name: Versioning
description: Background field used for large text entries to track changes

name: Versions
description: Stores previous versions of text

name: Audios
description: List of audio IDs

name: Audio
description: Audio ID for this object

name: Durability
description: The durability of this object

name: Journal Entry
description: Text for a journal entry. Used as a 'published' or 'polished' text for viewing.

name: Journals
description: The Journal objects associated with this object, typically for use with Pages

name: Prepared
description: List of spells that were explicitly prepared

name: Memorized
description: List of spells that were explicitly memorized

name: HP
description: Current health points for this object

name: Temp HP
description: Current temporary health points for this object. Similar to a shield

name: Max HP
description: Max health points for this object

name: Obscured
description: Flag to hide this from display to players

name: Spell Slots
description: Maps a spell level to the number of spell slots left for that object

name: Max Spell Slots
description: Maps a spell level to the maximium number of spell slots for that object

name: Warlock Spell Slots
description: Special spell slots for warlocks. Notably these are regained on short and long rests.

name: Max Warlock Slots
description: Maximum number of warlock spell slots

name: Warlock Spell Level
description: The level at which a warlock spell slot casts spells

name: Equipment Slots
description: Maps a Slot ID to the count of slots this object has to put equipment to

name: Damage Type
description: The damage type this object is considered to deal.

name: Use Atribute
description: The attribute (typically primary stat) used when using this object.

name: Dice Type
description: The type of dice primarily associated with this object.

name: Hit Dice
description: Hit dice present for this object, mapping the dice type (ie. d8) to the count possessed

name: Hit Dice Maximum
description: Hit dice present for this object, mapping the dice type (ie. d8) to the count offered

name: Minimum Range
description: This action is unable to target things this close or closer to you

name: Range
description: The reach of this action

name: Maximum Range
description: Targeting objects between your range and maximum range causes you to roll with disadvantage

name: Maximum Spells Prepared
description: Maximum number of spells you may have prepared

name: Maximum Cantrips Prepared
description: Maximum number of cantrips you may have prepared

name: Spell DC
description: The general difficulty of avoiding the full power of you cantrips and spells

name: Spell Attack
description: Your ability to aim a spell when performing it as an attack

name: Rolled HP
description: The total amount of HP rolled for an entity while leveling

name: Damage
description: Maps a Damage Type ID to a formula for the amount done by this object

name: Debuff
description: Indicating this is a negative effect

name: Ritual
description: Indicates this can be performed as a ritual as well as cast

name: Known Knowledge
description: Array of knowledge known by this object

name: Casting Time
description: Time to cast this spell in rounds

name: Is Cast Attack
description: Indicates this spell is an attack and is against creature Armor instead of a save for taking effect.

name: Casting Type
description: Usually Spell Cast or Spell Attack

name: Whose Turn
description: Indicates the entity whose turn it is in combat

name: Save With
description: Names the attribute with which to save against this object

name: Cast With
description: Overrides the default casting attribute of the casting creature for this spell

name: Verbal Components
description: Spell has verbal components

name: Gesture Components
description: Spell has hand gestures as part of its casting

name: Material Components
description: Array of items needed to cast this spell (Use parental IDs)

name: Source
description: The creature that told, taught, or gave you this

name: Cause
description: The spell that caused this. Typically an effect but possibly the creator of an object as well.

name: Instilled
description: List of effects to instill on a target as part of taking damage. Leverages the `unique` and `damage_required` fields on effects to determine when/how to add them.

name: Damage Required
description: Used for instilling effects on entities from taking damage. Flags that damage must be dealt for the effect to be added

name: Hit Required
description: Used for instilling effects on entities from taking successful attacks or failed saves against spells. Notably a spell with effects that have neither damage_required nor hit_required checked will always apply. This condition applying that the Hit roll exceeds AC or that the save is failed.

name: Is Display
description: Flags an object as used for display purposes only in cases where objects that `fire` are grouped with non-fired elements

name: Unique
description: Flag to indicate that this should only exist once in some context; ie. A unique effect should only exist for an entity once by parental ID

name: Is Owned
description: Quick flag to note that this object is owned by a specific player

name: Is Default
description: When true, this object is a copy and should be filtered out of some displays

name: Is Copy
description: When true, this object is a copy and should be filtered out of some displays

name: Is Template
description: When true, this object is meant to be a source for information and not given directly

name: Template Process
description: Specifies the process for for copying this object

name: Duration
description: How long something lasts once created; Such as effects or items. Spells may list this for how long a subsequent effect lasts.

name: Potency
description: How strong this object is. This is for use as part of computed values

name: Receive
description: Each entry in the array indicates an ID to copy and where to put the copy as part of receiving this. This is processed server side instead of inherited to generate copies as needed. If no copy is needed, inheritance should be used instead.

name: Importance
description: How important is this?

name: Acquired
description: When you acquired this

name: Effect Height
description: The height of the effect

name: Effect Radius
description: The radius of the effect

name: Effect Shape
description: The shape of the effect

name: Performable Actions
description: List of actions this entity can perform

name: Actions
description: The current action count for this object by type; main, bonus, reaction

name: Nation
description: The nation responsible for this

name: Action Cost
description: Indicates the action cost of this object by mapping the action types to their numeric costs; ie. action_cost.bonus = 1. Multiple costs are addative, so bonus = 1 & main = 1 means thsi object costs a main and bonus action

name: Action Max
description: Action count max for the various types.

name: Section
description: A grouping value for the object

name: Targets
description: Types that this object can target, for instance types of objects or creatures that a spell can affect

name: Resistance
description: Maps a Damage Type ID to a formula for the amount that this object reduces that damage type by when suffered by this object

name: Dashboard
description: The dashboard used by this object that indicates the widget layout to use

name: Component
description: Names the component to use for rendering

name: Default
description: Indicates that htis is the default object to use in certain cases such as dashboards

name: Selectable
description: Indicates that this object is selectable for some reason, such as a Feat or Proficiency that can be selected while leveling

name: Refresh
description: When true, the system will automatically refresh this object

name: Is Background
description: Flag for feats to be marked as potential charact backgrounds

name: Datasets
description: Tracks dataset associated with this object

name: Playable
description: Indicates that players can select this object as part of object construction

name: Content Type
description: Used for file data to indicate the type of data it holds

name: Nickname
description: Short name for this

name: Back Story
description: Backstory for this existance

name: Caster
description: The entity that knows this spell. Used for spell value calculations.

name: Armor
description: Your current Armor Class (AC)

name: Gold
description: The amount of gold on or in this entity or object

name: Max Gold
description: The maximum amount of gold this object or entity can hold

name: Height
description: The general width of the object

name: Worshipped God
description: Worshipped God

name: Born
description: The time at which this was born

name: Age
description: This creature's age

name: Move Speed
description: Movement speed while on the ground

name: Swim Speed
description: Movement speed while on the water or other liquids

name: Fly Speed
description: Movement speed while in the air

name: Needs
description: Maps an object ID to a needed count. For instance, Slot IDs are used to map the ID to the number of that slot used by this object. Archetypes use this to mark prior needed archetypes before this one can be choosen.

name: Remaining Slots
description: The calculated list of slots that are unused. This is used primarily for conditionals

name: Conditions
description: Array of formulas to check against the object, and pass on a non-zero value and fail on a zero value.

name: Last Rest
description: The last time you took a long rest. Used for checking exhaustion and if another long rest can be done.

name: Classes
description: List of classes currently applied to this entity

name: Exclusivity
description: List of archetypes that possessing this archetype blocks

name: Is Subclass
description: Flags this class as a subclass

name: Subclass For
description: Indicates the primary class for which this is a subclass

name: Populace
description: List of entities that are considered active at the location

name: Capital
description: The location of the capital for a nation

name: Also
description: Additional actions to fire with this one. Example, 'action:rest:finish' is an also for 'action:rest:trace' and 'action:rest:long' for common full rest triggers while allowing those 2 types of rest to be seperate.

name: Race
description: Race of this entity

name: Effects
description: Effects present on this object

name: Weather
description: Weather at a location

name: Weather Tabulation
description: Used by locations to determine the next weather state. This in its simpliest form comes down to something like '3d6' which then uses the weather 'mode range' to determine the weather.

name: Weather Duration
description: When a weather condition takes effect at a location, the duration is calculated using this string with 'weather' and 'location' being base properties for performing the calculation. This time then sets an occurrence in the Chronicler to end the current weather state and start a new one.

name: Weather Min Mode
description: Mode is essentially the range in which this weather state should be used and may vary by locational attributes. The basis of the range is to allow dice rolls to pick the weather and the mode range dicates which weather comes up.

name: Weather Max Mode
description: Mode is essentially the range in which this weather state should be used and may vary by locational attributes. The basis of the range is to allow dice rolls to pick the weather and the mode range dicates which weather comes up.

name: Speed X
description: Spedd traveling on the x axis

name: Speed Y
description: Spedd traveling on the y axis

name: Variants
description: Variations of this race

name: Is Singular
description: When true, this object will not be copied when given.

name: Is Sharing
description: When true, this creature is sharing its inventory.

name: Death Saves
description: Numer of successful death saves

name: Death Fails
description: Numer of failed death saves

name: Feats
description: Feats improving or diminishing this object

name: Notes
description: General text for notes taken by this object.

name: Equipped
description: List of objects currently equipped to this one.

name: Creature
description: The creature that possesses this. This is generally a reference field for calculating values

name: Character
description: The character that possesses this. This is generally a reference field for calculating values

name: User
description: The object using this object

name: Party
description: The party that this object is in

name: Cell Width
description: Number of cells (out of 4) that the widget should occupy in width

name: View
description: Generalization of the distance out to which this object can reasonably see.

name: Charges
description: Number of expendable charges available on this object.

name: Max Charges
description: Maximum number of expendable charges available on this object.

name: Recharges At
description: [Deprecated] Maps an event to the number of times that event must occur for this object to gain a charge.

name: Short Rests
description: Number of short rests towards a charge.

name: Long Rests
description: Number of long rests towards a charge.

name: Short Rests Needed
description: Number of short rests needed to gain a charge.

name: Long Rests Needed
description: Number of long rests needed to gain a charge.

name: Short Rest Recharge
description: Number of charges gained after the required short rests.

name: Long Rest Recharge
description: Number of charges gained after the required long rests.

name: Recharges After
description: Amount of raw time for a charge to be gained

name: Recharging Count
description: Maps an event to the number of times that event has occurred for this object toward recharging.

name: Recharges On
description: Lists the events that this object uses to recharge. This is potentially different from the object's Recharges At keys for conditional flavoring.

name: No Charges Transform
description: When set, this object takes the specified object as a parent in place of its current one when it runs out of charges.

name: Proficiency
description: The base added skill when an object is proficient with some aspect.

name: Level
description: The general level of this object.

name: Class Levels
description: Maps a Class ID to this object's level in that class.

name: Class Level History
description: Stores the order in which this object leveled up classes

name: Proficiency
description: Needed Proficiency for using this object with proficiency.

name: Skill Proficiency
description: Maps skill IDs to a boolean to indicate proficiency in that skill.

name: Advantage
description: Counts the amount of advantage this object has towards a skill check. Negative advantage here represents disadvantage on the check

name: Disadvantage
description: Counts the amount of disadvantage this object has towards a skill check.

name: Accepted Types
description: Lists types that are accepted by this object.

name: Rejected Types
description: Lists types that are rejected by this object.

name: Category
description: Category for this object. This is essentially just a flat qualifier and taken literally.

name: State
description: General state indicator for the object.

name: Master Screen
description: When true, this object is flagged for display on a Game Master's screen.

name: Master Review
description: When true, this object needs reviewed by a game master.

name: Game
description: Indicates a minigame supported by the instance to which this object refers.

name: Proficiencies
description: Proficiencies held by this object.

name: Consume
description: Can be consumed in the indicated quantity.

name: Consumes To
description: What this object becomes after consuming.

name: Consume Hint
description: Displayed to describe the consumption.

name: Consume Icon
description: Icon to display for consuming this object.

name: Symbol
description: The symbol for this god, city, or group.

name: Uses From
description: This uses charges from another property.

name: DC
description: The Difficulty Check associated with this object. The default for this when a creature is using it is generally that creature's {{Spell DC}}

name: Spell Cast DC
description: The Difficulty Check associated with spell attacks cast by this object.

name: Spell Attack DC
description: The Difficulty Check associated with spells cast by this object.

name: Weight Locked
description: When true, objects considered to be inside this object should not add weight to this object.

name: Attunements
description: List of objects to whith this object is attuned.

name: Attunes
description: Indicates if this object can attune to another object.

name: Attunement Locked
description: Indicates if this object can not unattune voluntarily.

name: Attunement Blocked
description: Indicates that attunements to this object or from this entity can not be started voluntarily.

name: Attuned
description: The object attuned to this object.

name: Attuned On
description: The date you attuned to this object.

name: Unattunable
description: When true, this object can not be unattuned as an action.

name: Active
description: Flag to mark this as a current or active object.

name: Weight
description: The weight of this object

name: Max Weight
description: The maximum weight of this object

name: Max Encumberance
description: The maximum weight of this object

name: Size
description: The size of this object

name: Stat
description: The main stat for this object

name: Max Attuned
description: Maximum number of attunements

name: encumberance
description: The encumberance of this object, representing how difficult it is to carry

name: Enchantment Rating
description: The power of enchantments on this object

name: Ranged Weapon
description: Flag to indicate if this object is considered a ranged weapon

name: Response
description: Maps various 'event' names to arrays that describe responses that are then consumed in various parts

name: Is Minion
description: When true the entity is a minion

name: Enchantments
description: Enchantments on this object

name: Versatile Weapon
description: Flag to indicate if this object can be wielded with different hand combinations

name: Versatillity
description: Maps a number to new parent to assume for the usage of that many hands.

name: Melee Weapon
description: Flag to indicate if this object is considered a melee weapon

name: Thrown Weapon
description: Flag to indicate if this object is considered a throwable weapon

name: Color Flag
description: The color of the lego hat to distinguish this NPC from other similar NPCs

name: Type
description: The primary type for this object

name: Types
description: The types that apply to this object

name: Inside
description: The entity this entity currently resides, such as a building or ship.

name: Location
description: Where this object is currently considered to be located.

name: Locations
description: List of locations connected to this object.

name: Max Font Size
description: Caps the icon indicator sizing in maps

name: Base Font Size
description: Starting font size for markers

name: Associations
description: Objects directly connected to this one. In the case of knowledge and similar classes, this indicates the objects that the knowledge conveys knowledge of

name: Knowledge Matrix
description: Maps object identities to arrays of properties explicitly known about that object. Forgotten objects map to null. Known with no explicit information map to empty arrays. This field is calculated during events that affect the object's knowledge.

name: Knowns
description: List of properties that are known through associated knowledges.

name: Spells
description: Spells contained inside of, prepared for, or granted by this object.

name: Known Spells
description: Spells that this entity knows for changing prepared spell list (`spells`).

name: Skills
description: Skills that this object can perform.

name: Must Know
description: When set, this object is hidden unless the viewing object has knowledge of this object or possess the specifically mention knowledge ID mentioned here. If a number is specified, the entity must have that many knowledges refencing this entity before it is considered 'known'.

name: Widgets
description: List of objects describing widgets

name: Page
description: A page that serves as a method for storing information.

name: Pages
description: List of pages associated with this object. Primarily used for rendering journals.

name: Carried Weight
description: The total weight of things being carried by this object. Computed by event handlers.

name: Inventory
description: List of item IDs that this object is carrying.

name: Price
description: The base price for this object.

name: Expiration
description: When this effect or item expires. This is a conveience field for display as the length of anything that expires should be described as a duration.

name: Critical
description: The minimum number needed to roll for an attack to be considered a critical strike.

name: Critical
description: The minimum number at which a skill check is considered to be a critical success.

name: Failure
description: The maximum number at which a skill check is considered to be a critical fail.

name: Score
description: An abstract point value for this object, used in estimating power or worth or value for comparison.

name: Threat
description: A general estimate of how threatening a creature is.

name: Label
description: Used as display text for this object in certain situations instead of the name, such as on a map.

name: Links To
description: Used for locations (or similar) to note door or portal like effects for mapping purposes.

name: Note
description: Game Master note.

name: Share Inventory
description: Flag to share your inventory with companions.

name: Hidden Inventory
description: List of items in your inventory to hide from sharing.

name: Concentration
description: A caster must maintain concentration on this spell and has a limited number of spells they can maintain this way.

name: Max Concentrations
description: The number of concentration spells a caster can maintain at once.

name: Concentrations
description: List of spells that a caster is concentrating on with the oldest listed first.

name: Time Tracked
description: Used on party object to track their game date/time and restore it when loaded. Two parties with this flagged can NOT be active at the same time and membership is checked when loading party. This is specifically to handle having multiple parties in the same world with differing in-game times but can also serve to keep party entities from being active together.

name: Party's Time
description: Tracks the time for the party. This time is set in the Universe when this party is loaded. Attempting to load a party member when the universe is not at this time should fail.

name: Always Present
description: When set, if an object shares a location with this object, it is considered visible. This is for things like shops to be visible.

name: Opening Time
description: Day offset in seconds at which in Game time when this object opens. Essentially for shops.

name: Operation Time
description: How long this entity stays open Essentially for shops.

name: Root
description: Used to flag an object as a starting point for any branching considerations

name: Next
description: Used to flag the next objects in a chain

name: Items
description: List of item IDs loosely associated with this object with no carrying or attachment considerations.

name: Owned By
description: Maps player IDs that own this object to the time at which they acquired it, 1 for general ownership, or 0 to disable ownership.

name: Discount
description: Maps entity IDs to a float for price to be paid (such as .8 for a 20% discount).

name: Players
description: Player IDs associated with this object. Typically for use with dashboards and other high level display objects.

name: Absent
description: Players who were absent for this.

name: Attchments
description: List of item IDs considered attached to this object.

name: Constitution
description: The physical condition of your body

name: Restricted
description: When set, the object's listed properties require knowledge with the 'reveals' property and the corrsponding object as a subject.

name: Condition
description: Used by Conditional objects to determine the condition on which to apply.

name: Concealed
description: Flag to hide this from display to players

name: Entity
description: Entity

name: Count
description: Count of this object that is present.

name: Required Level
description: The level required for this.

name: Is Inherited
description: Flags this as an object that can not be selected and is instead inherited or gained naturally.

name: Concentration Required
description: Indicates that an effect should end if the caster looses concentration on the originating spell.

name: Concentration Origin
description: Tracks the Spell ID that requires concentration from the caster.

name: Is Deprecated
description: Used to mark an object and its children for clean up. Once marked, the system will alert masters and log when it encounters those objects.

name: Previously
description: The meeting that preceeded this one

name: Up Next
description: The meeting that proceeded this one

name: Deletable
description: Flag for objects that should be removed, either at a later date or as part of a confirmation process where multiple lients may be used to finish the deletion (Master client and later onthe master screen from a filter for bulk removal). Future plans include automated bulk processing of all flagged objects severla hours after an active session ends provided no new active session is found.

name: Revoked
description: When this object was removed

name: Spell Modifier
description: Used for calculating spell related difficulties, typically the direct result of a stat modifier and determined by your primary or initial class

name: Artificer
description: Current Artificer level

name: Skill Damage
description: Maps a Damage Type ID to a formula for the amount done by a specific skill instead of by an entity.

name: Included
description: When true, the flagged object should automatically be added to the meeting's active trackers (such as entities).

name: Self Instilled
description: List of effects to instill on the caster as they cast a spell or otherwise use this object

name: Width
description: The general width of the object

name: Yields
description: What is created as a result.

name: Consumed
description: Consumed in the process.

name: Cause Level
description: The level of the cause, general the level at which a spell was cast.

name: Bonus Weapon Damage
description: Damage added to weapon based attacks. Follows the damage type of the weapon, or {{Bludgeoning}} if no type is present.

name: Bonus Spell Damage
description: Damage added to spell based attacks

name: Can See Sky
description: Indicates that the currently active setting can see the sky. This is to control feedback to the players regarding time of day

name: Split Damage
description: When declaring multiple targets for damage, each target's damage gets rolled distinctly instead of shared.

name: Base Feat
description: The base feat for this feat, used for essentially denoting progression

name: Is Special
description: Flags a singular item as unique, allowing additional flagging on it as though it were a private/copyable object but ignoring possessives such as the character field

name: Is Open
description: For entities like doors that can be both locked & unlocked as well as openned and closed.

name: Interior
description: The interior location for this. Serves as the 'entry' location.

name: Is Position Hidden
description: When true, this must be known to show on a map.

name: Interior Of
description: The entity of which this location represents the interior. Used when moving entities to automatically set (or clear) the {{inside,field:inside}} property.

name: Control Source
description: Source for control properties such as {{is_locked,field:is_locked}} or {{is_powered,field:is_powered}} and represents a source power station or locking mechanism for broad control.

name: Is Marker
description: Used to mark something as an abstract idea where being near it doesn't denote visibility to it.

name: Is Powered
description: Whether this is powered or not. Important for objects like force fields or other magically driven devices.

name: Token Width
description: Width of the token in studs

name: Token Height
description: Height of the token in studs

name: Token Image
description: Image to display for the token

name: Token Rotation
description: Radians to rotate the token

name: Is Sky Visible
description: Indicates that the currently active setting can see the sky. This is to control feedback to the players regarding time of day

name: Z Position
description: Z location of the object.

name: Token Z Rending
description: Used for layering a token on a map.

name: Can't Speak
description: Indicates that a creature, item, or speaking object is no longer able to speak.

name: Can't See
description: Indicates that a creature, item, or object with eyes is no longer able to see.

name: Can't Hear
description: Indicates that a creature, item, or object with ears is no longer able to hear.

name: Can't Cast
description: Indicates that a creature or item is no longer able weave or think the arcane symbols needed to cast spells.

name: Max Targets
description: The maximum number of targets this can strike

name: Processor
description: An event response function to process event data within the context of the universe; function(event, universe, utility) { ... }

name: Universe Event
description: The string for the Event emitted within the Universe as part of the simulation

name: Universe Events
description: List of Universe Event bindings through Occurrences for the object

name: Event
description: The event to which the object is related.

name: Target Limit
description: Limits the number of available targets for this. 0 for no limit.

name: Melee Additive
description: When true, this is available to add to attacks with melee weapons.

name: Range Additive
description: When true, this is available to add to attacks with ranged weapons.

name: Spell Additive
description: When true, this is available to add to spell damage.

name: Always Additive
description: When true, this is always added to attacks.

name: Charged Additive
description: When true, adding this to attacks requires a charge.

name: Charged-Hit Additive
description: When true, adding this to attacks requires a charge but only depletes on a successful strike.

name: Attack Additive
description: When true, effects from this can be added to an attack.

name: Attack Additive Notes
description: If set, displays the message when this additive is selected.

name: Attack Additive Notes
description: If set, displays the message when this additive is selected.

name: No Sync
description: When true, this object is entirely ommitted from being sent to clients. Recommended for 'background' like computational elements to keep the client side data lean. Adjusting between sessions may also be of use. Note that re-enabling sync for a client will not have any effect until the client refreshes their data either through the system menu or with an app refresh.

name: Looped
description: Indicates this shouold be looped. Typically applies to audio clips for client side playback.

name: Playlists
description: Playlists for this object

name: Capability
description: Maps a control capability to a truthy or falsy value. Mapping is used for fast comparisons instead of an array

name: Control Device
description: The underlying device for this object.

name: Is Discovered
description: Indicates that the object has been found by a relevent discovery process recently. May switch to false if a discovery process runs and this object is not found when expected.

name: Errors
description: Array of objects describing relevent errors for the object. Used for display sync and investigation. Logs shouold still be consulted for more in-depth analysis.

name: Discovery
description: Indicates the discovery process that is responsible for this object, if any.

name: Model
description: Model ID

name: Last Seen
description: The timestamp for when this was last seen

name: IP Address
description: The IP address of the object on the network

name: Control Point
description: The address to which to send control requests, such as the main Sonos device IP or the IP of the DLink Light. This leverages the control_type field on the server for how to handle requests.

name: Control Search
description: Search parameters for the server to locate this device with discovery protocols.

name: Control Type
description: Identifies the type of equipment in the room that the system can leverage for this object's purposes, such as 'light:dlink' or 'audio:sonos'.

name: Skill Additions
description: Maps skill IDs to the addition available to add to the respective rolls.

name: Randomized
description: Indicates to randomize a related list or array.

name: Loop Buffer
description: Buffering time at the end of the clip at which to loop

name: Details
description: An arbitrary object describing relevent information about this

name: Chronicle ID
description: Identifies an event in the Universe's Chronicle of activity

name: Active Events
description: Maps Chronicle IDs or Activity IDs to objects with the related Universe Chronicle data to which this object needs to respond or is essentially currently performing

name: Historical Events
description: List of objects describing important events for reference outside of the chronicle

name: Has Channel
description: Used to indicate that an object can possess an additive object (Such as what weapon to attack with) that can be set

name: Channel
description: The channel (Such as a weapon for an attack action) that the object is using

name: User Bars
description: Array of Objects for a User to select from

name: Bar Actions
description: Array of Objects for a User to select from

name: Soundscapes
description: List of soundscapes to associate with the object

name: Soundscape
description: The soundscape to associate with the object

name: Scape
description: Describes what audio objects to play and to which destinations in the audio arrangement from the soundboard. Each object in the array describes a 'destination' as an integer index, either positive or negative, from the 'master' position designated by the soundscape arrangement with +10 and -10 being special designations for room and auxillary room play. A 'delay' field indicates how many milliseconds the destination should wait before playing the sound. An 'audio' field denotes the audio object ID to be played.

name: Script
description: Describes a piece of code to handle determining what should be performed.

name: Handlers
description: List of handlers to respond to the object.

name: Start Time
description: When this started

name: Is Positive
description: Indicates that the object is a good effect.

name: Is Negative
description: Indicates that the object is a good effect.

name: Activities
description: Activities associated with this object.

name: Universe Event
description: The string for the Event emitted within the Universe as part of the simulation

name: Bonus Damage Type Lock
description: The channel dealing damage must deal damage of this type for this bonus to apply.

name: Volume
description: The audio level at which this is played, or at least the initial when loaded ranging from 0 to 100

name: Scratch Page
description: Indicates a page used for general quick notes for an object, possibly something scratched onto it.

name: Master Fallback
description: Flag to direct faults to use the Master Player instead.

name: Bonus Skill Roll
description: Added to any performed skill check rolls.

name: Bonus Skill Check
description: Adds to the specific skill check's roll

name: Bonus Effect Lock
description: The additives described here-in can only apply when the target has the specified effect or a descendent.

name: Bonus Type Lock
description: The additives described here-in only apply to things of this specific type.

name: Birthday
description: When this was born.

name: Board State
description: Tracks a representation of the shown state for this object, such as a chess board.

name: UI Component
description: Specifies a special UI component to associate with this object. The importance of this is contextual to the classification of the object

name: Score Limit
description: Limits the selection from a list by a score value

name: Session Events
description: Events from during the session that have or will be used.

name: Rendering Label Opacity
description: 0 to 1 decimal for how opaic the label rendering should be.

name: Rendering Fill Opacity
description: 0 to 1 decimal for how opaic the rendering fill should be.

name: Rendering Path Opacity
description: 0 to 1 decimal for how opaic the path rendering should be.

name: Point Cost
description: Number of points the object costs for various selection controls

name: Has Citadel
description: Indicates if this location has a fortified structure

name: Has Port
description: Indicates if this location has a port

name: Has Plaza
description: Indicates if this location has a plaza for trade

name: Has Temple
description: Indicates if this location has at least 1 temple

name: Has Walls
description: Indicates if this location has a fortification wall around its interior. Usually excludes any shanty districts

name: Has Shanties
description: Indicates if this location has 'poor' or 'cheap' districts where the population is more loosey stored.

name: Birthplace
description: The town or village where you were born.

name: Secret Affairs
description: Things you've done in the past that you try to hide from others.

name: Secret Thoughts
description: Thoughts that you hide from others.

name: False Rumors
description: Rumors about this character that spread around where they travel that are false.

name: True Rumors
description: Rumors about this character that spread around where they travel that are true.

name: Label Shadow Blur
description: Depth of the label's shadow's blur effect.

name: Label Shadow Color
description: The color in which to render the label's shadow where appropriate.

name: Label Color
description: The color in which to render the label where appropriate.

name: Show Name
description: Indicates that the name for this should be shown where appropriate (Currently limited to Map View Regions and Paths)

name: Label Shadow Color
description: The color in which to render the label's shadow where appropriate.

name: No Border
description: When set, no border is rendered on the map label.

name: Has Quest
description: Has a quest or objective of some relevance

name: Casting At
description: The level at which this entity is casting spells.

name: Cast Level
description: The level at which this entity is casting spells.

name: Finesse Weapon
description: A weapon that can use either the user's {{Strength}} or {{Dexterity}} modifier when making an attack and dealing damage.

name: Versatility
description: Maps a Damage Type ID to a formula for the amount done by this object when there is at least 1 other free hand

name: Ammo
description: Item used when firing. Used directly or in the parental chain.

name: Loaded Weapon
description: Flag to indicate this weapon must be loaded and can thus only fire once per round even if you can make multiple attacks per round. This does NOT preclude attacking with this weapon and then switching weapons.

name: Clear on Next Turn
description: Remove or clear when the creaure's turn starts. Used for situations such as effects that clear at the start of the next turn.

name: Recipes
description: Known crafting recipes that can be performed.

name: Receiving Field
description: The field to receive information from this.

name: Input Components
description: Items and Types needed for an activity. Items are used by parental inheritance and Types are used with type commonality.

name: Tracking Field
description: The field used for tracking data from this, such as storing a spell for concentration or an {{Artifier}} {{Infusion}}.

name: Infusions
description: Tracks {{Artifier}} {{Infusion}} creation.

name: Is Entity Created
description: Flag to note that an entity is created and needs added to the active meeting. Used during creation processes when determining where to add the new objects.

name: Yield Limit
description: The number of different options that can be used from the yield list at once.

name: Yield Class
description: Limits the class of what this can create via the yields field.

name: Date Needed
description: Real time offset by which time that this is needed.

name: Categories
description: Categories for this object. This is essentially just a flat qualifier and taken literally.

name: Priority
description: Priority to start.

name: Effort
description: A generalization of the effort it will take to achieve or complete

name: DM Tasks
description: Related tasks.

name: Player Affected
description: Flag to note that at least one player is affected. This generally drives notifications and hints around associated objects.

name: Is Baseline
description: Used to flag a release as a baseline for reseting the weekly progress tracking.

name: Repetition
description: How to repeat this object

name: Hints
description: Lists directly relevent hints

name: Date Completed
description: Real time offset indicating when this was finished.

name: Tasks
description: Lists directly relevent tasks

name: Association Index
description: Maps an ID to the most recent timestamp at which is became associated. This is generally aimed at automated tracking of associations for dmrelease objects.

name: Date Started
description: Real time offset indicating when this was started.

name: Missed
description: The number of times this was missed or incomplete.

name: World
description: The location used for the world relative to this.

name: DM Releases
description: Related releases.

name: Weight Calculation
description: Script to calculate the weight for a dmtask given a task, release, and universe arguments. This is the script body and need not be wrapped.

name: Bonus Channel Lock
description: The additives described here-in can only apply when the channel for the attack is this or a descendent.

name: Bonus Effect Lock
description: The additives described here-in can only apply when the target has the specified effect or a descendent.

name: Bonus To Class
description: Additives described here only apply if the channel exists and is of the named class (ie. spell, feat, item, etc)

name: Bonus To Ranged
description: Additives described here only apply to range flaged attack channels

name: Bonus To Melee
description: Additives described here only apply to melee flaged attack channels

name: Is Combatable
description: Flags this object as eligible to queue into the combat list. This is used for excluding things like buildings or summons that move on their master's turn.

name: Address
description: Internet address for the resource, this could be an IP, domain, etc.

name: Is Secure
description: Encryption flag

name: Vista
description: Maps a meeting type to an image. This is meant for presentation responses to meeting state type changes .

name: Rarity
description: Indication of how rare this item is from 0 (Very Common) to 10 (Legarily Rare). More than 10 will not rewrite with a summary but is essentially a story item at that point

name: Is Shared
description: This object is shared other nearby objects in someway.

name: Is Sharing Knowledge
description: This object is sharing it's knowledge with entities in the meeting if the knowledge is marked as shared.

name: Created
description: Timestamp of when this object was created.

name: Updated
description: Timestamp of when this object was updated.

name: Is Presenting
description: Flag for presentation systems to display this object

name: Equipment Sets
description: List of equipment sets this object may use.

name: Acknowledge
description: Name of the event to acknowledge

name: Printed Columns
description: The printed columns of Markdown text for this piece. Note that to get the appropriate new line separation, you'll want to use 'JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(`[Text Here from Notepad]`))' with the tildas to trigger Javascript templating, which should them give a string that can be placed into the UI with a `json::` prefix

name: Masthead
description: Heading text for the piece. Must be present to show the 'read' button from info.

name: Footer
description: Printed footer for the piece

name: Print Heading
description: Printed Image Heading for this text

name: Print Columns
description: Printed columns of text for this item

name: Eldritch Knight
description: The number of levels of Eldritch Knight you have.

name: Arcane Trickster
description: The number of levels of Arcane Trickster you have.

name: Spell Casting Level
description: The culmination of your experience and ability for casting magic. This is the primary determination in what spell slots you possess and indicates your ability to manage magic.

name: Bonded
description: The character to which this is bonded

name: DC Save
description: Names the skill with which to save against this object

name: Days
description: The number of days in this object

name: Day
description: The day on which this occurs, usually paired with a month

name: Month
description: The month on which this occurs

name: Months
description: The months covered by this object

name: Period (Days)
description: The number of days in a period for this object, such as full moons or spinning cycles

name: Festivals
description: Celebrations that are of concern to this object

name: Week
description: This object has a time consideration and a week is the indicated days

name: Moons
description: Moons associated with this object

name: Period (Seconds)
description: The number of seconds in a period for this object, such as a day

name: Seconds
description: The number of seconds in a period for this object, such as a day

name: Seasons
description: Seasons associated with this object

name: Suns
description: Suns associated with this object

name: Equation: Sunrise
description: Determine when the sun would rise based on a world top-location location where-by the x and y positional coordinates inform the output.

name: Equation: Sunset
description: Determine when the sun would set based on a world top-location location where-by the x and y positional coordinates inform the output.

name: Calendar
description: The calendar usied by this object

name: ID
description: The ID of the object

name: Era
description: The era that this is a part of.

name: Creator
description: Thentity that created this

name: Number of Attacks
description: Number of attacks that can be performed when using the attack action

name: Channel Form Data
description: Describes the form to prompt for additional data when using this in an action

name: Channel Form Filter
description: Maps a field name to the query to use for any results or validation

name: Form Sets
description: Fields that the form value from here sets on targets under specific conditions

name: Error Log
description: Stores a short list of recent errors associated to this object. Used as a quick reference for display feedback and quick investigation

name: Stocks
description: The types of things stocked to this object by the restock process.

name: Last Stock
description: When this object was last stocked by the restock process.

name: Stocks Persist
description: Controls what should remain when restocking. This is primarily for retaining any placed Uniques so that the DM can manage moving them with story.

name: Stocks Templates
description: This object stocks template based items. This is primarily used in the restock process.

name: Stocks Unique
description: This object stocks unique items. This is primarily used in the restock process.

name: Stocks Singular
description: This object stocks singular items. This is primarily used in the restock process.

name: Stock History
description: A short history of events from the restock process.

name: Access
description:
Maps class names to access levels, 0 for none, 1 for 'guest' level access and usually with the following access restrictions, though objects may define their own access:
+ 10: Class Description
+ 20: Class Documentation
+30: Access to 'Your Stuff' based on player and assigned entities
+ 50: Read
+ 60: Update
+ 70: Create
+ 80: Delete
+ 100: Usually 'Maximum' Access
+ 120: Special access to 'universe' class to Create a field
+ 140: Special access to create a new class
+ 200: Special access to shutdown the server and all subscribed children (This essentialy should cause PM2 or similar to restart the world).

name: API Key
description: Maps an apikey ID to an expiry date for this object to use the key, 0 or negative for no end.

name: Access Key
description: The API key used by this server to access this world.

name: Parent World
description: The world responsible for managing this world. This is primarily used for API syncing when a world changes and the managing server informs this server.

name: Sync Templates
description: When set, templates are synced from this world down to this one

name: Sync Unique
description: When set, unique objects are synced from this world down to this one

name: Sync Singular
description: When set, singular objects are synced from this world down to this one

name: Stock Point
description: Maps a type to a numeric calculation to detemine how much of an object of that type to stock to this object during the restock process.

name: Stocks Periodically
description: Defines the period over which this object should automatically restock, if any

name: Randomgly Stocks
description: Types stocked by this object at random.

name: Important
description: Lists elements that are important as reminders. This serves to note elements for the Players and GMs to remember about meetings, persons, places, or things and is meant to be set by the GM explicitly.

name: The Scene
description: Used to describe the opening scene of the object, typically a meeting

name: Is Restock Excluded
description: This object is excluded when entities are calculating their restock.

name: processed
description: Maps an Occurrence to a boolean to indicate if it has been processed.

name: Stock Maximum Rarity
description: Maps a type to a numeric calculation to detemine the inclusive maximum rarity to stock. If this maps to a value of 5, that is the maximum. If this is 0, there is no maximum. If min and max are omitted, the rarity is not considered.

name: Stock Minimum Rarity
description: Maps a type to a numeric calculation to detemine the minimum rarity to stock. If this maps to a value of 5, that is the minimum. If this is 0, there is no minimum.

name: Effect
description: Effect to make note of

name: Restock Skew
description: Controls the skew for the restocking normal distribution. Numbers over 1 move the skew to the low/min side of the range and fractions less than 1 move it to the high/max side of the range. The higher the number, the further towards the min. The smaller the fraction, the farther towards the max. 0 or less will result in 0 for the entire restock and shouold only be used as an inheritance way of nuetralizing the restocking, such as a location being destroyed.

name: Action
description: The action that was taken for this object

name: Target Repetition
description: Lets the targetting for this object repeat the indicated number of times on the same entity.

name: Is Restful
description: Indicates that a long rest will heal a creature here.

name: Enchantment Level
description: The level to which this item is enchanted.

name: Master Notification
description: When this item is used a notification is sent to the DM from 'master_notice' or a generic notice of `item.name` used.

name: Master Notice Message
description: When this item is used, this message is sent to the dungeon master

name: Auto Excluded
description: General flag to indicate that an object shoould be excluded from automatic processes like adding objects to knowledge association.
